user_goal: 在 B015 (regime-adaptive activation policy) 与 B016 (risk parity HRP upgrade) signed off 后，把两个批次留下的真实数据验证 outstanding research item 合并到一个 Codex-only 小批次里跑掉：让 Codex 一次性获取 B014 真实 yfinance 9 资产 snapshot (2018-2025)，重新生成 B015 与 B016 比较报告（real_data_status 从 skipped 翻为 ran），跨策略对比 only_non_normal / only_crisis / always_on 三 activation policy 与 inverse_volatility / hrp 两 weighting method 在 calm window 2020-06..2022-12 的 absolute return gap vs static 60/40 与 2020/2022 stress sub-window max DD，用经验数字回答两个研究问题：is the B013 gap shrunk under regime-aware activation? is the B010 gap shrunk under HRP? 任何 stress threshold breach 走 framework/proposed-learnings；任何 hybrid 候选走 backlog；**B017 不修改任何 strategy / 测试 / spec 代码**，纯 Codex 跑现成 script + 写 signoff。
evaluator_feedback: B017 F001-F004 PASS. Real yfinance snapshot acquired and registered; B015 and B016 reports regenerated with real_data_status=ran; cross-analysis completed against static 60/40. All empirical 2020/2022 stress gates stayed above -15%. B015: only_crisis was marginally closer to 60/40 than always_on, only_non_normal was worse; B016: hrp underperformed inverse_volatility by 496.44 ending-value units and increased turnover. Full sweep 526 passed; ruff/mypy/compileall clean. Signoff at docs/test-reports/B017-real-data-validation-signoff-2026-05-15.md.

session_notes.planner: 2026-05-15 B017 done wrap-up: Confirmed Codex F001-F004 PASS (4/4, 0 issues, fix_rounds=0). Repaired stale completed_features 0→4 (Codex omission). Empirical findings landed (full table in evaluator_feedback): B015 conclusion = regime-aware activation does NOT meaningfully shrink B013's gap vs 60/40 — only_crisis +$257 (0.26% improvement, but 2022 DD worsens 15x to -7.72%); only_non_normal -$3,148 (worse). B016 conclusion = HRP does NOT shrink B010's gap vs 60/40 — HRP -$496 + turnover +41% vs inverse-vol. Both research questions answered NO; both stress gates safe (no -15% breach). Codex did NOT add proposed-learnings or backlog entries; planner judged two observations worth surfacing and per user direction (option A) wrote them into framework/proposed-learnings.md as 待确认 entries: (1) synthetic fixture vs real-data signal reversal warning (B016 saw HRP slightly better on synthetic, real reversed); (2) B013/B010 vs 60/40 gap root cause is NOT L1 trend gating and NOT weighting method — open research question. MVP analysis prepared (per user request) for next-batch recommendation: PRD §10/§11/§4 success criteria all met; §12 last milestone (Broker Adapter Paper) crosses §5 non-MVP line; B017 negative findings suggest gap root cause investigation may be highest-ROI before adding more strategies; alternatives include satellite策略 (BL-B011-S2 medium) / smoothed vol / VIX overlay / pause. role_assignments already null; backlog unchanged (BL-B010-S1 + BL-B011-S2 + BL-B013-D1 + BL-B013-D2).
